name: 重男輕女惡毒原生家庭
name_en: Toxic Birth Family Favoring Biological Daughter
description: 紀家父母拋棄養女、偏愛親生女兒，是推動女主被迫嫁入豪門的原始動力，也是觀眾最渴望看到被打臉的對象。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Don't call me mom. I'm not your mother. You fake... For 20 years, I always said with my jeans. How could I give birth to an ugly girl like you?... Get out. From now on, the G family and you have nothing to do with each other.
examples.context: 紀家父母拋棄養女、偏愛親生女兒，是推動女主被迫嫁入豪門的原始動力，也是觀眾最渴望看到被打臉的對象。
